name: ASRock B850 LIVEMIXER WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - M.2 (Key E) - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
